title: podman system service: takes 4-6s to clean up on interrupt
body:
New flake. It's a one-off, but ISTR something new last week dealing with pprof, so am filing with just one single data point:

### podman system service verify pprof endpoints [It] are available
* fedora-34 : int podman fedora-34 rootless host
  * PR #11919
    * [10-11 11:04](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4721141563523072/html/int-podman-fedora-34-rootless-host.log.html#t--are-available--1)
    * [10-11 11:04](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4721141563523072/html/int-podman-fedora-34-rootless-host.log.html#t--are-available--2)
    * [10-11 11:04](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4721141563523072/html/int-podman-fedora-34-rootless-host.log.html#t--are-available--3)

### podman system service verify pprof endpoints [It] are not available
* fedora-34 : int podman fedora-34 rootless host
  * PR #11919
    * [10-11 11:04](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4721141563523072/html/int-podman-fedora-34-rootless-host.log.html#t--are-not-available--1)
    * [10-11 11:04](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4721141563523072/html/int-podman-fedora-34-rootless-host.log.html#t--are-not-available--2)

(all links are to the same log, same run).

(Tagging as `rootless` but that may just be serendipity. I will remove the tag if I see a failed root run).

comments.body: @edsantiago While in server.go for the pprof work, I "fixed" the issue where the API service was not shutdown in an orderly manner when --time=0. At the given logging level for these tests, I cannot determine if they were spurious but I will try to recreate on my laptop.

...and, [another one](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5529224694988800/html/int-podman-ubuntu-2104-rootless-host.log.html#t--are-not-available--1). I get the feeling this might soon become our number-one flake.
